problem id: 410a5cbd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(6) OR NOT SHR(4)

examples:
  00111000 -> 11111100
  01001111 -> 11111011
  10100010 -> 11110111
  00110111 -> 11111100
  11010001 -> 11110011
  11110111 -> 11110011
  01110111 -> 11111001
  11000010 -> 11110011
  01000101 -> 11111011
  11000000 -> 11110011

query: 00110000
predicted answer: 11111100
